serviceAreaDescription: Youth-led support in Rochdale, with a wider community welcome for young people, carers, referrers, volunteers, partners, and older people who may need connection or practical help.
missionSummary: Empower young people and strengthen the wider community through practical guidance, safe spaces, and youth-led support.
visionSummary: Build a stronger, more connected community where people feel supported, understood, and able to grow.
launchMediaPolicy: Use the supplied AI illustration suite for launch atmosphere and narrative, but replace trust-critical imagery with consented real photography when available.

operationalAssumptions.summary: A public phone number has not been supplied yet and must not be invented in page content.
Whether sessions are free, open access, or referral-based is not confirmed in the source materials.
